text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This summer is all about finding efficient running
techniques—anything to help Ines make it
through the Kikuka Sho without collapsing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, apparently she's started a new side
gig to fill her free time. She seems to be spending
more and more time working...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, she remains eager to find a safer running
style, and approaches camp with unbridled
enthusiasm. Let's make the most of this summer!
